TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Calvin_Booth, title = Calvin_Booth, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calvin_Booth} }

S.FORM: Calvin Booth nalecuhan i Reynoldsburg, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Calvin Booth i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Washington Wizards putiput. 5 bulad 7 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Calvin Booth, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ nar~ɾəʦuħan i *ənor~ɾdsburg, oħio, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu wasħiŋton wizards putiput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Calvin Booth nalecuhan i Reynoldsburg, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Calvin Booth i 1999 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 35, namapili' tu nu Washington Wizards putiput. 5 bulad 7 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Calvin Booth, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ nar~ɾəʦuħan i *ənor~ɾdsburg, oħio, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu wasħiŋton wizards putiput. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦar~ɾ*in bootħ, miunduaj.
